query: SELECT COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Device:', ch.deviceId)) as name, ch.userId, ch.deviceId, COUNT(ch.id) as cycles, SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles, SUM(ch.correctCount) as correct, SUM(ch.totalTimeMs) as total_time FROM cycle_history ch LEFT JOIN users u ON ch.userId = u.id GROUP BY ch.userId, ch.deviceId, u.name ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Device:', ch.deviceId)) as name, ch.userId, ch.deviceId, COUNT(ch.id) as cycles, SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles, SUM(ch.correctCount) as correct, SUM(ch.totalTimeMs) as total_time FROM cycle_history ch LEFT JOIN users u ON ch.userId = u.id GROUP BY ch.userId, ch.deviceId, u.name ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC LIMIT 20;
